title: Update mtrmac/gpgme vendor again, eventually
body:
#39 fixed build with current RHEL 7, but the updated code is rejected with Go 1.6 (see https://github.com/proglottis/gpgme/pull/5 ).

A hopefully final and fully correct fix was sent upstream as https://github.com/proglottis/gpgme/pull/7 . After we are sure this is the best fix, we should update mtrmac/gpgme (if necessary) and then update the vendored copy in skopeo.

(No action needed right now; filing this now so that it happens eventually.)
